hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASP compliance teams consolidate wallet screening alerts into structured cases that reduce manual review and maintain a clear audit trail for KYT workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Wallet screening alerts create manual bottlenecks
problem_description: Compliance teams at VASPs face high volumes of false positive wallet screening alerts that require time-consuming manual review. This slows transaction monitoring workflows and fragments risk visibility across disconnected provider outputs and case management systems.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet screening outputs, links risk alerts to customer and transaction data, and routes false positives into structured case workflows for efficient review and audit-ready traceability.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet screening alerts, routes reviews based on risk, opens cases for investigation, preserves evidence, and supports defensible compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond false positive noise. One review-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms fragmented wallet screening alerts into connected cases, decisions and evidence to reduce manual workload and support audit-ready compliance workflows for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in managing wallet screening false positives with structured workflows, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence for secure, enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY help manage wallet false positives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY consolidates wallet screening alerts into structured reviews, helping teams identify and manage false positives through clear workflows and rule-based triage.
faq_2_question: How are KYT alerts and cases handled?
faq_2_answer: KYT alerts are routed into cases with linked evidence and context, supporting prioritization, escalation and comprehensive investigation workflows within SFTY.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages to support traceability and support audit and regulatory review requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with multiple KYT, blockchain analytics and wallet screening providers, aggregating risk signals into a connected compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing wallet screening tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing wallet screening tools and providers, organizing their outputs rather than replacing them in your compliance stack.
final_title: Bring wallet screening alerts into clear workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY helps VASPs manage wallet screening false positives through structured cases and audit-ready decision records.
